props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Thermostats in {city}

faqs.question: What are the benefits of upgrading to a smart thermostat?
faqs.answer: Smart thermostats learn your schedule, allow remote control via your phone, provide energy usage reports, and can save you up to 10-15% on heating and cooling costs annually.

faqs.question: Is a smart thermostat compatible with my HVAC system?
faqs.answer: Most smart thermostats are compatible with standard HVAC systems. Our technicians will verify compatibility during a consultation and recommend the best thermostat option for your specific setup.

faqs.question: How long does thermostat installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard thermostat installation typically takes about 30 minutes to an hour. If additional wiring is needed, it may take slightly longer. We handle everything from removal of the old unit to setup and programming.
